languages.text: "Ограниченность... рассудка... ничтожный". {n}Ксенос лязгающе смеется, прерываясь лишь на то, чтобы оценить вашу реакцию.{/n} "Лишь стоящий подле тебя... повинен... в угасании комплементарного ему разума... Необратимо".

"Limitations of... your reasoning... lowly one." {n}The xenos lets out a clanging laugh, pausing only to assess your reaction.{/n} "Only the one beside you... is guilty... of the extinction of the intellect that complemented him... Irreversibly."
languages.original_text: "Ограниченность... рассудка... ничтожный". {n}Ксенос лязгающе смеется, прерываясь лишь на то, чтобы оценить вашу реакцию.{/n} "Лишь стоящий подле тебя... повинен... в угасании комплементарного ему разума... Необратимо".

"Limitations of... your reasoning... lowly one." {n}The xenos lets out a clanging laugh, pausing only to assess your reaction.{/n} "Only the one beside you... is guilty... of the extinction of the intellect that complemented him... Irreversibly."

languages.text: “有限的……推理能力……卑贱者。”{n}异形发出一声铿锵的冷笑。他停顿了一会儿，观察着你的反应。{/n}“真正有罪的……是你身边那位……是他让那份曾与他互补的智识彻底熄灭……无可挽回。”
languages.original_text: "Limitations of... your reasoning... lowly one." {n}The xenos lets out a clanging laugh, pausing only to assess your reaction.{/n} "Only the one beside you... is guilty... of the extinction of the intellect that complemented him... Irreversibly."

traits.locale_text: “有限的……推理能力……卑贱者。”{n}异形发出一声铿锵的冷笑。他停顿了一会儿，观察着你的反应。{/n}“真正有罪的……是你身边那位……是他让那份曾与他互补的智识彻底熄灭……无可挽回。”

languages.text: «Limitaciones de... tu razonamiento... miserable». {n}El xenos suelta una carcajada metálica, deteniéndose solo para comprobar tu reacción.{/n} «Aquel a tu lado... es el culpable... de la extinción del intelecto que lo complementaba. Irreversible».
languages.original_text: "Limitations of... your reasoning... lowly one." {n}The xenos lets out a clanging laugh, pausing only to assess your reaction.{/n} "Only the one beside you... is guilty... of the extinction of the intellect that complemented him... Irreversibly."

traits.locale_text: «Limitaciones de... tu razonamiento... miserable». {n}El xenos suelta una carcajada metálica, deteniéndose solo para comprobar tu reacción. {/n}«Aquel a tu lado... es el culpable... de la extinción del intelecto que lo complementaba. Irreversible».

languages.text: « Les limitations du... raisonnement de votre intellect... inférieur. » {n}Le xénos laisse échapper un cliquetis rieur, ne s'interrompant que pour jauger votre réaction.{/n} « Seul l'être à vos côtés... est coupable... de l'extinction de l'intellect qui le complétait.... Ceci est irréversible. »
languages.original_text: "Limitations of... your reasoning... lowly one." {n}The xenos lets out a clanging laugh, pausing only to assess your reaction.{/n} "Only the one beside you... is guilty... of the extinction of the intellect that complemented him... Irreversibly."

traits.locale_text: « Les limitations du... raisonnement de votre intellect... inférieur. » {n}Le xénos laisse échapper un cliquetis rieur, ne s'interrompant que pour jauger votre réaction.{/n} « Seul l'être à vos côtés... est coupable... de l'extinction de l'intellect qui le complétait.... Ceci est irréversible. »

languages.text: "Muhakemenin... Sınırlılıklarından." {n}Zeno, sadece tepkini ölçmek için duraklıyor ve çınlayan bir kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Onu tamamlayan zekânın... Geri döndürülemez bir şekilde yok oluşunun... Tek suçlusu... Yanındaki."
languages.original_text: "Limitations of... your reasoning... lowly one." {n}The xenos lets out a clanging laugh, pausing only to assess your reaction.{/n} "Only the one beside you... is guilty... of the extinction of the intellect that complemented him... Irreversibly."

traits.locale_text: "Muhakemenin... Sınırlılıklarından." {n}Zeno, sadece tepkini ölçmek için duraklıyor ve çınlayan bir kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Onu tamamlayan zekânın... Geri döndürülemez bir şekilde yok oluşunun... Tek suçlusu... Yanındaki."

languages.text: "Beschränkungen ... Eures Verstandes ... niederes Wesen." {n}Der Xenos stößt ein klirrendes Lachen aus und wartet auf deine Reaktion.{/n} "Allein er, der neben Euch steht ... ist schuld ... an der Auslöschung des Verstandes, der ihn komplementierte. Unwiderruflich."
languages.original_text: "Limitations of... your reasoning... lowly one." {n}The xenos lets out a clanging laugh, pausing only to assess your reaction.{/n} "Only the one beside you... is guilty... of the extinction of the intellect that complemented him... Irreversibly."

traits.locale_text: "Beschränkungen ... Eures Verstandes ... niederes Wesen." {n}Der Xenos stößt ein klirrendes Lachen aus und wartet auf deine Reaktion.{/n} "Allein er, der neben Euch steht ... ist schuld ... an der Auslöschung des Verstandes, der ihn komplementierte. Unwiderruflich."

languages.text: 「...論理的思考能力の欠如...卑劣な存在」{n}異種族は金属のような笑い声をあげ、あなたの反応を一瞬見極める。{/n}「あなただけ...彼の補完的な思考能力の消滅...に罪がある」
languages.original_text: "Limitations of... reasoning intellect... lowly one." {n}The xenos lets out a clanging laugh, pausing only to assess your reaction.{/n} "Only the one beside you... is guilty... of the extinction of the intellect that complemented him."

traits.locale_text: 「...論理的思考能力の欠如...卑劣な存在」{n}異種族は金属のような笑い声をあげ、あなたの反応を一瞬見極める。{n}「あなただけ...彼の補完的な思考能力の消滅...に罪がある」
